name: Poppy Seed Hamantaschen
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the dough by mixing 4 cups of flour with salt and baking powder.
2. Add shortening to the dry ingredients and mix until crumbly.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs and honey.
4. Gradually combine the wet mixture with the flour mixture until a soft dough forms.
5. Roll out the dough thinly on a floured surface.
6. Cut into triangles or circles, place a teaspoon of filling in each, and fold into a triangle shape.
7. Place filled pastries on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Bake at 375°F (190°C) until golden brown, about 20-25 minutes.
9. Turn off the oven when done and allow to cool completely before serving.
